tasks.label: check-times-all
args: Get-ChildItem "c:\Users\ronak.chaturvedi\Documents\ollam\data\Board_Report_Quaterly_WithoutCommentary\*.json" | Select-Object Name,LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: list-active-shell-python
args: Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'python|powershell|pwsh' } | Select-Object ProcessName,Id,StartTime,CPU,Path | Sort-Object StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: list-active-shell-python-2
args: & { Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "python|powershell|pwsh" } | Select-Object ProcessName,Id,StartTime,CPU,Path | Sort-Object StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize }

tasks.label: kill-workspace-python
args: Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Get-Process python,powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name,Id,StartTime,CPU -AutoSize

tasks.label: kill-python-final
args: Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process python,powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name,Id,StartTime,CPU -AutoSize

tasks.label: keep-one-flow-process
args: $procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^python(\\.exe)?$' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'flow.py' } | Sort-Object CreationDate; if (-not $procs) { Write-Output 'No flow.py process found.'; exit 0 }; $keep = $procs[-1]; $kills = @($procs | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -ne $keep.ProcessId }); foreach ($p in $kills) { Invoke-CimMethod -InputObject $p -MethodName Terminate | Out-Null }; Write-Output ("Kept PID: " + $keep.ProcessId); if ($kills.Count -gt 0) { Write-Output ("Killed PIDs: " + (($kills | ForEach-Object { $_.ProcessId }) -join ', ')) } else { Write-Output 'No duplicates to kill.' }; $remaining = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^python(\\.exe)?$' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'flow.py' } | Sort-Object CreationDate; Write-Output 'Remaining flow.py PIDs:'; $remaining | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.ProcessId }

tasks.label: keep-one-flow-process-2
tasks.command: $procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'python*' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*flow.py*' } | Sort-Object CreationDate; if (-not $procs) { Write-Output 'No flow.py process found.'; exit 0 }; $keep = $procs[-1]; $kills = @($procs | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -ne $keep.ProcessId }); foreach ($p in $kills) { Invoke-CimMethod -InputObject $p -MethodName Terminate | Out-Null }; Write-Output ('Kept PID: ' + $keep.ProcessId); if ($kills.Count -gt 0) { Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + (($kills | ForEach-Object { $_.ProcessId }) -join ', ')) } else { Write-Output 'No duplicates to kill.' }; $remaining = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'python*' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*flow.py*' } | Sort-Object CreationDate; Write-Output 'Remaining flow.py PIDs:'; $remaining | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.ProcessId }

tasks.label: verify-flow-processes
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'python*' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*flow.py*' } | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,CreationDate,CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize
